data.description: character regains some spent Hit Dice upon finishing a rest, explained below.

In many situations, your roleplaying efforts can alter an NPC's attitude. However, you might need to recuperate, and adventurers also have time for rest between their adventures. For example, the DM may call for ability checks or skill checks during interactions if he or she wants to determine the outcome of an interaction. Between trips to dungeons and battles against ancient evils, your roleplaying efforts can influence NPCs in various ways. Additionally, you might spend time performing other tasks such as crafting, researching, spending gold, or preparing for your next adventure.
